misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: front matter with magazine masthead and publication information, table of contents for March 1933 issue, subscription and editorial office details, extensive advertisements for LDS garments from multiple retailers (Cutler's, Utah Woolen Mills, Barton & Co.), beauty shop ads (Mitchell's Beauty Shops), utility company ads (Utah Power & Light Co.), educational institution ads (LDS Business College), book advertisements (Deseret Book Company), clothing ads (Mountaineer Overalls), and prohibition-related content including a Methodist Episcopal Church declaration and Canadian liquor revenue statistics. The prohibition content appears to be informational/editorial material rather than a standalone article.
